strategy: Hit with Ice or Life (+35% each) and avoid Death (80% resist).
Do not cast Wards (Shields or Traps). A ward makes her randomly cheat Power Nova and Earthquake, dealing 400 Myth to all enemies and stripping your blades; Mass Feint triggers this too.
You can Unbalance to Dispel the Power Nova portion if you must place a ward.
Do not bank pips: reaching 8 or more pips makes her Mana Burn you at the start of the Round; Unbalance also dispels this, and a spell already queued still fires.
Since Earthquake strips blades, set up quickly and hit before she can respond; keep your pip count under 8 until you are ready to cast.
Stack Ice or Life blades in one burst, then fire before hitting the 8-pip line.
cheatNotes: Casting any Shield or Trap makes her randomly cheat Power Nova and Earthquake, hitting all enemies for 400 Myth and stripping your blades; avoid wards and set up with blades quickly.
The Earthquake part does not touch her own charms or wards, only yours.
She is more likely to use this after she has attacked, including after her Mana Burn.
Pet-cast wards do not trigger this cheat.
Mass Feint counts as a ward and triggers the Power Nova and Earthquake; avoid it.
Unbalance can Dispel the Power Nova portion if you need to place a ward.
Reaching 8 or more pips makes her Mana Burn you at the start of the Round; hit before you bank that many pips.
Unbalance also Dispels the Mana Burn cheat.
A spell you already queued still fires even if the Mana Burn drains your pips, so commit your hit before she can burn you.
